synopsis: Luke Skywalker and Darth Vader enter the deadly Crystal Valley as arranged by Domina Tagge, whose plan is to see both her enemies killed. The *Millennium Falcon* arrives on Baron Orman Tagge's orders, and Orman enters the valley to confront Vader. Vader convinces him that Domina is not the innocent he believes and persuades him to duel Luke in Vader's place, using an illusion to make Luke think he is fighting Vader himself. Luke kills Orman, escapes the Crystal Valley, and is reunited with his Rebel comrades.
title: Star Wars (1977) #37: In Mortal Combat
